name: BB:UBA : Detecting Authentication Bruteforce Attempts (Vertical)
notes: This rule detects large number of authentication failure events against a single user in a shorter time frame. This rule detects vertical brute force attack.
bb_references: BB:UBA : Detecting Authentication Bruteforce Attempts (Vertical) on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when an event matches all of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters, BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication Failures
when at least 100 events are seen with the same Username in 1 minutes
thresholds: when at least 100 events are seen with the same Username in 1 minutes
TD_list: APPLY BB:UBA : Detecting Authentication Bruteforce Attempts (Vertical) on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches all of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters, BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication Failures
AND when at least 100 events are seen with the same Username in 1 minutes
